idea-plugin.name: Stormies - Pixel Agents
idea-plugin.description:
Bring your Claude Code agents to life as animated pixel art characters in a charming virtual office — right inside your IDE.

The plugin watches Claude Code session transcripts and translates real-time agent activity into pixel art animations. Each agent gets a unique character with a generated name, walks to a desk, sits down, and types when working. Tool usage, permission requests, and sub-agent spawns are all reflected live.

Highlights

  • Live Agent Detection — Characters spawn automatically when Claude Code sessions are running, with a matrix rain effect
  • Unique Characters — 6 base palettes with hue shifting for unlimited color variations; each agent gets a compound name (e.g. "swift-otter")
  • Pet Sub-Agents — Task tool sub-agents appear as animated pets: Cat, Dog, Owl, Axolotl, Hedgehog, Red Panda, Jellyfish, Chameleon, Penguin, or Bat
  • Tool Status Overlays — Real-time activity bubbles show what each agent is doing (file being edited, command being run, waiting for permission)
  • Office Layout Editor — Full editor with tile/wall painting, furniture placement, undo/redo, one-click randomize, and dynamic auto-fit mode
  • 86 Furniture Items — Desks, chairs, PCs, plants, bookshelves, kitchen appliances, wall art, and more across 8 categories
  • Customization — Floor and wall color controls (hue, saturation, brightness, contrast), per-tile coloring, custom asset import, layout import/export
  • Agent List Panel — Expandable panel showing all active agents with status indicators and activity text

No modifications to Claude Code are needed — the plugin passively observes session transcript files.

Based on the Pixel Agents VS Code extension by Pablo De Lucca.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.0
  • Performance optimization — shared overlay tick at ~20fps, reduced backend polling intervals
  • Added Performance Impact section to README with resource usage KPIs
1.1.0
  • Thinking thought bubbles — cloud-style bubbles show what Claude is pondering during its reasoning phase
  • Activity animation templates — dedicated animations for each tool type
  • UI visibility toggle — eye icon to hide/show all overlays
  • Project-scoped agent detection — each IDE window only shows its own project's agents
  • Improved plugin JAR loading with fallback strategies
1.0.1
  • Fixed plugin loading issue after install
1.0.0
  • Initial release
  • Animated pixel art characters for Claude Code agents with unique names
  • Pet sub-agents (10 exotic pet types) spawned by the Task tool
  • Real-time tool status overlays and permission indicators
  • Full office layout editor with 86 furniture items
  • One-click randomize and dynamic auto-fit layout modes
  • Floor and wall color customization with 7 tile patterns
  • Custom asset import support
  • Layout persistence and import/export
  • Agent list panel with status tracking
  • Matrix rain spawn/despawn effects
  • Optional notification chime
